title: ForceSensor Property
description: Sets or returns the number of the force sensor in question.
notes: This sets the number of the subject force sensor, or when confirming, uses the properties thereof.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Monitor

Force Trigger
examples:
Function Test_ForceSensor Integer iVar FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 3 FGet FM1.ForceSensor, iVar Print iVar
Fend
